summary: Tested Summer Camp CRM lead counts, Assign Lead (backend+frontend), assignee filter, and capture-lead dedup. All backend tests (5/5) and frontend flows pass. KPI totals sum correctly (10+50+0+0+5+0=65). Assign modal + toast + row update work end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminStudentCRM.jsx is very large (>2500 lines) — consider splitting into Summer Camp / Student CRM / Tracking sub-components
cleanup-duplicates endpoint is admin-only but uses get_current_user without an explicit role check — verify the shared dependency enforces admin role
seed_data_creation: One phone_captured booking created via capture-lead dedup test (ephemeral test phone).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_summer_camp_assign.py covers: capture-lead dedup returns same booking_id; assign+unassign PATCH /api/summer-camp/bookings/{id}/assign persists/clears assigned_to/assigned_to_name; invalid team user returns 404; cleanup-duplicates returns {success,removed}; KPI-status sum equals total. DB currently has 65 bookings (10 phone_captured, 50 lead, 5 converted/payment_offline). 14 active team users. Data-testids used: camp-assignee-filter, camp-assign-cell-{id}, camp-assign-{id} (mobile), camp-assign-btn-{id} (desktop row actions), camp-assign-to-{user_id}, camp-unassign-btn, camp-assignee-tag-{id}. Assign modal is rendered conditionally on campAssignModal state.
